lastReleaseMessage: Rock terrain removed: grass is the only ground tile. Deleted rock_tile.png + rock_placeholder.png and the rock texture path; _draw_ground always renders the BR256Grass tile. Skirmish now uses grass. base_terrain_type + the ROCK enum stay as reserved biome plumbing but no longer pick a texture.

barRaise.topFinding: The motion is real and the action list is not closing. Ten commits landed since the 06-22 review (v0.58.54 to v0.59.3): the first Spine2D-animated unit (rifleman, v0.59.0) proves the animation pipeline end-to-end, the WorldGenerator extract pulled gameplay.gd 3422 to 3333 lines, and the native-scale purge (v0.59.1) deleted every asset-scale constant behind a new check_no_scale_constants P0 gate. But none of the ten commits was an M1 mechanics row, so completion holds at 40% and the stall aged from twelve days to thirteen, and every standing MEDIUM is still open: the release footer-and-automsg gate is unbuilt on its ninth audit, the bare CHANGELOG band v0.58.25-v0.58.42 is still published, and the .bak files plus the stale building.gd header are untouched. The cycle opened two new MEDIUMs of its own: the rifleman renders at native Spine rig size (the new scale gate blocks the in-engine fix; only Navy's re-export resolves it), and the Spine GDExtension shipped with a Windows-only payload against an M4 deliverable that needs a macOS and Linux build. The pipe ships features fast; the recurring list keeps not moving, and that is what holds the verdict.

actions.title: git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (makes the v0.57.8 gitignored claim true) and correct the building.gd header version refs (v0.67.0 / v0.61.14 vs a v0.59.3 repo).
Source or build the macOS and Linux Spine GDExtension payloads (or document the gap as a known M4 blocker) and record the Godot-4.6.2 / Spine-4.3.17 version lock in docs/SPINE_INTEGRATION.md.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall or between-mission save/load); M1 held at 40% for thirteen days while effort went to art and infrastructure.
Get Navy's on-screen-size Spine re-export for the rifleman; it renders at native rig size and the check_no_scale_constants gate blocks the in-engine workaround.
Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); ninth audit running, the durable closer for the footer and bare-message classes.
Rewrite the bare CHANGELOG band v0.58.25-v0.58.42 to describe its work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05840-2026-06-18.
